title: Tagaru Palya
subTitle: After a villager secures a marriage alliance with a city boy for his only daughter, he prepares to offer a sacrifice to the gods. However, things go awry during the ceremony.

title: Sivaranjani
subTitle: Valli, a young woman, meets with an accident and loses her memory and Karthik steps in to help her recover. However, she finds herself troubled by an evil spirit.

title: Rebel Raja
subTitle: Vishnu, the owner of a greeting card company, falls in love with Keerthi who is overprotective. However, her peculiar nature creates a rift between the two of them.

title: Jaanu
subTitle: Ram and Jaanu are childhood sweethearts who meet at their school reunion after nearly two decades. Although initially awkward, they soon start recollecting their past and resolve their differences.

title: Rama Banam
subTitle: Vicky runs away from home after having a disagreement with his brother Rajaram and goes on to become a known gangster. Years later when he returns, the two polar opposite brothers reunite.

title: Judwaa No.1
subTitle: When a woman delivers a stillborn for the third time, her mother-in-law replaces the dead baby with one of another woman's twin babies.

title: Meri Adaalat
subTitle: Ajay, a journalist, gets in trouble when Maria, his new sister-in-law, recognises him as a murderer. Things further get complicated when Inspector Kiran, Ajay's lover, is assigned the murder case.

title: CID
subTitle: An Intelligence officer is found dead in the jungle. It appears that the body was tortured and there are visible signs of combat before death.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

subTitle: A simple man falls for a rich landlord's daughter and in order to prove his love and marry her, he must become an MLA and succeed.

title: Taqdeerwala
subTitle: Suraj turns his fortunes around with the help of a mysterious book that tells him the future. Before long, the Hindu god of death and the divine accountant come looking for it.
